title: Elements:
content:
Elements:
- AnimatedShape:
Size: 120x120px
Animation: Continuous morph loop
- Title:
Font: System UI Medium, 24pt
Example: "The Challenger"
- Description:
Font: System UI Regular, 14pt
Lines: 2-3 max
- TraitIndicators:
Type: Horizontal bar chart
Metrics: [Stability, Intensity, Complexity]
InteractionStates:
Hover: Card elevation + 4px, shape animation speed +20%
Selected: Border glow effect, shape solidifies
Disabled: 50% opacity, grayscale filter
```

**Visual Mockup Description**:

- Six cards arranged in responsive grid
- Each card features a unique animated geometric form
- Color coding: Warm (nurturing) → Cool (challenging)
- Subtle parallax on scroll/swipe
- Selection triggers immediate shape transformation preview
